_INSTRUCTIONS_FOR_PLAYER: Use this to build or rebuild your character's spellbook with full spell descriptions.
Great for: new casters, leveling up, preparing different spells, or filling in missing details.
1. Open Gemini or any AI chat
3. Tell the AI what you need:
'Build a spellbook for a level 3 Wizard with 16 INT. I want Shield, Misty Step,
Web, Scorching Ray, and all my cantrips are Fire Bolt, Mage Hand, Prestidigitation.'
'I'm a level 5 Cleric of Life. Give me a good prepared spell list for a dungeon crawl.'
5. In the app: open character sheet > Edit > '📋 Update from JSON'
6. KEEP 'Preserve HP, XP, conditions & inventory' CHECKED
7. Tap Apply — your spellbook and magic summary will update
- Ask for spell combos: 'What spells synergize with Hypnotic Pattern?'
- Ask for situational loadouts: 'Prepare a social/infiltration spell list'
- Warlocks: include your Mystic Arcanum spells
- Don't forget ritual spells — Wizards can ritual cast from their spellbook
_INSTRUCTIONS_FOR_AI: INSTRUCTIONS FOR THE AI:
The player wants you to build a spellbook for their D&D 5e character.
Output a JSON object containing ONLY the spell-related fields listed below.
The app will merge this into their existing character, keeping everything else.
REQUIRED FIELDS TO INCLUDE:
- name: the character's name (MUST be included so the app can validate the import)
- magic: summary string with spellcasting ability, save DC, attack bonus, and spell list by level
- spellbook: array of spell objects with FULL descriptions for every spell
- slots: array of {max, used: 0} for each spell level the character has access to
MAGIC STRING FORMAT:
'Spellcasting: Intelligence | Save DC: 15 | Attack Bonus: +7
Cantrips: Fire Bolt, Mage Hand, Prestidigitation
Level 1 Spells: Shield, Magic Missile, Detect Magic, Find Familiar
Level 2 Spells: Misty Step, Web, Scorching Ray
Level 3 Spells: Fireball, Counterspell'
SPELLBOOK ENTRY FORMAT:
'name': 'Fireball',
'level': 3,
'school': 'Evocation',
'castTime': '1 action',
'range': '150 ft',
'duration': 'Instantaneous',
'components': 'V, S, M (a tiny ball of bat guano and sulfur)',
'desc': '8d6 fire damage in 20-foot radius sphere. DEX save for half. +1d6 per slot above 3rd.'
SPELL RULES:
- Cantrips are level 0 in the spellbook array
- Include the upcast/at-higher-levels info in the desc field
- For concentration spells, mention 'Concentration' in the duration field
- Calculate Save DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + spellcasting ability modifier
- Calculate Attack Bonus = proficiency bonus + spellcasting ability modifier
OUTPUT: Return ONLY the JSON object with name, magic, spellbook, and slots. No wrapper, no code fences.

_EXAMPLE_OUTPUT.name: Valenns Vogelsang
_EXAMPLE_OUTPUT.magic:
Spellcasting: Intelligence | Save DC: 13 | Attack Bonus: +5
Cantrips: Fire Bolt, Mage Hand, Prestidigitation
Level 1 Spells (Prepared): Shield, Magic Missile, Detect Magic, Find Familiar (ritual)

spellbook.name: Fire Bolt
spellbook.desc: Ranged spell attack. 1d10 fire damage. Ignites unattended flammable objects. Damage increases at 5th (2d10), 11th (3d10), 17th (4d10) level.

spellbook.name: Shield
spellbook.castTime: 1 reaction (when hit by attack or targeted by Magic Missile)
spellbook.desc: +5 to AC until the start of your next turn, including against the triggering attack. Also blocks Magic Missile.
